deactivation.hosting: You are currently hosting a game. Proceeding with this action will result in game termination.

deactivation.connected: You are currently in a game. Proceeding with this action will result in leaving it
deactivation.connecting:
Can't leave while connecting.
Please wait

playerName.title: Player Name
playerName.tooltip: Represents player name within multiplayer session. Limited to 24 characters

syncAI.title: Synchronize AI Actions
syncAI.tooltip:
AI actions don't have any randomness, so their turns play out the same for everyone in multiplayer.
In rare cases, AI might attack a different target or make an extra attack after moving - usually because of position desync or low FPS (it's messing up with best AI action score calculation).
Enable this if you want to get extra synchronization(stability) at the expense of extra stuttering

hostPortRangeStart.title: Host Port Start
hostPortRangeStart.tooltip:
The first available port within the configured range is selected to host a multiplayer game. Keep this value equal to 'Host Port End' to always host on a specific port only.
Valid values are 1024-65535

hostPortRangeEnd.title: Host Port End
hostPortRangeEnd.tooltip:
The first available port within the configured range is selected to host a multiplayer game. Keep this value equal to 'Host Port Start' to always host on a specific port only.
Valid values are 1024-65535

dangerZone.title: Danger zone (make sure you know what you are doing)

defaultForcedPauseTimeout.title: Default 'Forced pause' timeout
defaultForcedPauseTimeout.tooltip:
Default delay to lift forced pause once specific criteria is met.
Basic format is 00:00:00 (but not limited to) which means Hours:Minutes:Seconds

restEncounterForcedPauseTimeout.title: Rest Encounter 'Forced pause' timeout
restEncounterForcedPauseTimeout.tooltip:
Delay to lift forced pause once random rest encounter is synchronized for everyone.
Basic format is 00:00:00 (but not limited to) which means Hours:Minutes:Seconds

errors.invalidAddress:
Unable to parse provided server address.
Please verify your input.
errors.invalidPort:
Invalid port specified.
Acceptable range is '0 > port <= 65535'.

rolls.failedToAcquireRemoteDamageRoll: Failed to acquire damage roll from remote player which guarantees desync in the game
rolls.failedToAcquireRemoteHealRoll: Failed to acquire heal roll from remote player which guarantees desync in the game
rolls.failedToAcquireRemoteRoll: Failed to acquire {0} roll from remote player which guarantees desync in the game
rolls.invalidRemoteDamageRoll: Network damage contains an invalid number of damage values which guarantees desync in the game

rest.noCampingPermission: Camp can be placed by the host only

leveling.archetypeContentMismatch: Unable to select archetype due to mismatched game content (DLCs/mods)

spellBook.noSpellSlotPermission: Changing spells is restricted to character owner only

forcedPause.noPermission: Pause can be removed by host only
forcedPause.areaLoading: Please wait for other players to finish loading the area
forcedPause.restRandomEncounterLoading: Please wait for other players to finish loading the random encounter
forcedPause.notSyncedPauseYet: Can't unpause until everyone is paused
forcedPause.noTrapDetectedYet: Waiting for everyone to detect trap

combat.clientTurnOrderDesync: Turn order has been overriden by Host due to detected desync
combat.hostTurnOrderDesync: Player {0} is trying to start different character turn, forcing to start the same one
